abilities.name: Distracting Whispers
abilities.description: Enemy characters within a2 suffer - to Willpower duels.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Ignores other characters/terrain during movement. Reduce Ranged/Close Combat damage by half.

abilities.name: Misery
abilities.description: When enemy within 6 yards fails Willpower duel, suffers 1 damage after resolving.

abilities.name: Regeneration +1
abilities.description: Heals 1 damage at start of turn during Dramatic Time.

actions: (1) Hurl Heavy Object (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: z9 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Ram Crushing Strike: Damage flip gains + per Ram. Mask Forceful Push: After succeeding, push up to 3 yards and Prone.

(1) Paranormal Activity (Prestidigitation) | Every character within p6 must succeed TN 12 Willpower duel or become Slow. Character may move unattended objects 200 lbs or less within 6 yards to other location within 6 yards. Once per turn only.
system.notes: Much more active than Sorrows. Little patience for slow mental collapse. Telekinetic rage. Haunt buildings - homes, libraries, warehouses. Powerful Neverborn bind them as servants.
